backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing user profiles, rental creation and lookup with access control, and paginated or filtered rental retrieval.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented frontend files to specific features, components, and test requirements with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file including components, hooks, pages, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based style definitions establishing color variables, themes, and base styling for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point defining the root container and loading the main TypeScript application module.
frontend/ORDER_FLOW_TEST.md: Manual end-to-end testing guide for verifying rental ordering, acceptance flow, and authorization behavior across buyer and owner roles.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the TanStack Router with routes for all main pages and wraps them in a layout containing the header and footer.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Responsive site header with navigation links, login button, and mobile menu toggle.
Modal form to submit a rental purchase request, validating user input and creating an order.
frontend/src/components/ImageUploader.ts: Handles image file selection, validation, preview, upload progress, and removal.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Login/logout button using Internet Identity with loading state and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusBadge: Displays a styled badge for order status such as Pending or Accepted.
frontend/src/components/RentalCard.tsx: Displays rental details including image, price, description, and contact info.
frontend/src/components/SearchRentalResu: Shows rental search result details and includes a button to initiate a purchase dialog.
frontend/src/hooks/useAcceptOrder.ts: Mutation hook to accept an order and refresh related order queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useBuyerOrders.ts: Fetches orders for the logged‑in buyer and formats their data for display.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateOrder.ts: Mutation hook to create a new buyer order and invalidate buyer order queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateRental.ts: Mutation hook to create a new rental listing and refresh the rentals list.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity context and provider, creating and managing AuthClient instances and exposing login state, identity, and helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useOwnerOrders.ts: Fetches owner orders using the actor API and formats them for UI consumption.
frontend/src/hooks/useRentals.ts: Loads paginated rentals, accumulates pages, and exposes load-more behavior with react-query.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchRentals.ts: Searches rentals by term via actor.searchRentals and returns results with loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Fetches a user profile by principal string and returns buyer name and loading state.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind CSS layers and defines light/dark theme variables and global styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider, then renders App.
frontend/src/pages/AddRentalPage.tsx: Form page to create a new rental, handling validation, image upload, submission, and success states.
frontend/src/pages/FindItemsPage.tsx: Empty page placeholder for finding items.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with navigation buttons to add or search rentals.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrdersPage.tsx: Displays the logged‑in user's rental orders with loading, empty, and error states.
frontend/src/pages/OwnerMessagesPage.tsx: Shows owner rental orders, allows acceptance of orders, and handles authorization and feedback.
frontend/src/pages/SearchRentalPage.tsx: React page that manages a search query, fetches either all rentals or filtered results, and displays loading, empty, or grid views with SearchRentalResultCard components.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters, storing/retrieving them in sessionStorage, and handling persistence and cleanup for hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, colors, fonts, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file describing RentEasy’s current feature set, architectural rules, and requirements for rental search and order acceptance workflows.
